Tests if Math.pow(-1, -Infinity) returns NaN.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion statement that tests the behavior of the `Math.pow` function in JavaScript. It checks if raising `-1` to the power of negative infinity (`-Infinity`) results in `NaN` (Not-a-Number). The use of `assert` indicates that this is part of a test suite or a validation script to ensure that the `Math.pow` function behaves as expected in this specific edge case. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation and its expected result.
